2606.20084.title: Residual-Space Evolutionary Optimization via Flow-based Generative Models
2606.20084.paper_summary: Data editing with generative methods typically requires differentiable objectives and gradient-based search. However, these assumptions break down in flow-based settings, where edits are performed through forward and backward integration and often involve non-differentiable or black-box objectives. We introduce residual-space evolutionary optimization, a model-agnostic framework that addresses this gap by combining flow-based generative editing with evolutionary algorithms. Building on the observation that conditional flow matching (CFM) can disentangle condition-controlled factors from instance-specific residuals, our framework directly operates in residual space and separates two complementary search regimes: self-pollination performs local exploitation through feature-preserving residual refinement, and cross-pollination promotes broader exploration by recombining residuals across heterogeneous samples. As a proof of concept, we validate on MorphoMNIST, a benchmark dataset for counterfactual generation, and on crystal data, demonstrating that this exploration--exploitation decomposition provides a useful mechanism for balancing target alignment, instance preservation, and diversity, and extends beyond images to real-world scientific domains.
2606.20084.paper_summary_zh: 數據編輯使用生成方法通常需要可微分的目標和基於梯度的搜索。<lb/>然而，這些假設在基於流的設置中失效，因為編輯是通過前向和後向積分進行的，並且通常涉及不可微分或黑箱目標。<lb/>我們引入了殘差空間進化優化，這是一種模型無關的框架，通過將基於流的生成編輯與進化算法相結合來解決這一差距。<lb/>基於條件流匹配（CFM）可以將條件控制因素與特定實例的殘差解耦的觀察，我們的框架直接在殘差空間中運作，並分離兩種互補的搜索範疇：自我授粉通過特徵保留的殘差精煉進行局部開發，而交叉授粉則通過在異質樣本之間重新組合殘差來促進更廣泛的探索。<lb/>作為概念驗證，我們在 MorphoMNIST（一個反事實生成的基準數據集）和晶體數據上進行了驗證，展示了這種探索-開發分解提供了一種有用的機制，用於平衡目標對齊、實例保留和多樣性，並且超越了圖像，擴展到現實世界的科學領域。
2606.20084.author: Zhuo Cao et.al.
2606.20084.authors: Zhuo Cao, Lena Krieger, Fernanda Nader, Xuan Zhao, Hanno Scharr, Ira Assent
